untranslatable_reason: Flag pattern identification requires visual/multi-bar consolidation detection not expressible with single-bar indicators. Prior trend direction determination requires lookback logic beyond available operators. Measure rule and target price computation are explicitly marked AUTHOR_SILENT with incomplete details.
translation_notes: Approximated flag breakout using Donchian channel crosses with volume confirmation. Entry conditions represent breakout in direction of prior move (using ATR-derived channels). Exit uses reversal of entry signal. Success rates vary 19-26% across market conditions per source data; stop_loss and hold_days set conservatively. True flag pattern detection would require pattern recognition library.
